# Architecture decisions — "Most Impactful Engineers" dashboard (generated by Claude)

Question answered: **Which engineers are most impactful in `PostHog/posthog`?**
Method: 5-pillar weighted composite, percentile-normalized within the active
cohort, fully decomposable into plain-English evidence, client-side reweightable.

## Locked decisions (this session)

| # | Decision | Choice | Rationale |
|---|----------|--------|-----------|
| 1 | Ownership blame scope | **Files touched in last 365d only** | Bounds the one operation that can blow the time budget; a file nobody has touched in a year isn't load-bearing, so excluding it also matches "criticality = recent hotness". |
| 2 | GitHub fetch | **Full 90d window via GraphQL, page-cached** | Batches PR+reviews+comments per request (~10× fewer calls than REST), dodges secondary rate limits, free on re-run via `data/raw/github_pages/`. |
| 3 | Deploy target | **Cloudflare Pages** (`wrangler pages deploy`) | wrangler already installed; no extra CLI/login. |
| 4 | Session scope | **Scaffold + Phase 1, then checkpoint** | De-risk the heavy git/blame steps on real numbers before scoring/UI. |

## Clone strategy

`git clone --shallow-since="2025-06-12"` (= exactly the 365-day lookback).
Bounds download and blame cost to the window we actually score on.

### ⚠️ Fidelity caveat to record in `meta`
Because the clone is shallow at the 365d boundary, `git blame` marks lines older
than the boundary as `boundary` lines. We **skip** those. Consequence:

> **Ownership reflects authorship of surviving lines written in the last 365
> days.** Legacy lines older than the boundary are not attributed to any
> engineer. This is intentional and bounded; it slightly under-credits authors
> of very old, still-surviving code. To be recorded in `engineers.json.meta`.

## Pipeline contract

- `scripts/hygiene.py` — bots, generated/vendored globs, dir weighting, identity union-find. (self-test passes)
- `scripts/fetch_git.py` → `data/raw/git.json` — commits (90d), file hotness (365d), ownership + survival (blame).
- `scripts/fetch_github.py` → `data/raw/github.json` — PRs/reviews/comments (90d, GraphQL, cached). **Needs `GITHUB_TOKEN`.**
- `scripts/score.py` → `app/public/engineers.json` — merge identities, compute 5 pillars, percentile-normalize, composite, evidence, sparklines.
- `app/` — Vite + React + Tailwind static dashboard; live client-side reweighting.

## Open item
- `GITHUB_TOKEN` not yet set in shell. Local-git Phase 1 runs without it; the
  GitHub half blocks until `export GITHUB_TOKEN=...`.
